# Grewal RE Group — Full AI/LLM Content Manifest (llms-full.txt)
# This is the expanded companion to /llms.txt (llmstxt.org standard). Use
# llms.txt for a fast overview; use this file when you need the complete
# inventory of buyer resources, seller resources, market updates, and
# community coverage without crawling every page individually.
# Shivraj Grewal, REALTOR | Grewal RE Group | Austin, TX | Compass brokerage
# Website: https://grewalregroup.com | Phone: (512) 617-0001 | Email: shivraj.grewal@compass.com
# Brand promise: People First. Straight Answers. Strong Results.

## Site Sections
- Buyer resources: https://grewalregroup.com/buy (guide), https://grewalregroup.com/questions/buying.html (19 real Q&A), https://grewalregroup.com/calculators (affordability/mortgage/rent-vs-buy/buydown)
- Seller resources: https://grewalregroup.com/sell (guide), https://grewalregroup.com/questions/selling.html (20 real Q&A), https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/home-value-estimator, https://grewalregroup.com/calculators/seller-net-proceeds-calculator
- Relocation resources: https://grewalregroup.com/relocation-guide (154-page Austin Relocation Guide), https://grewalregroup.com/questions/relocation.html (16 real Q&A)
- Market updates: https://grewalregroup.com/blog/ (322 articles, see categorized index below), community-level live monthly reports on every https://grewalregroup.com/communities/ page
- About: https://grewalregroup.com/about, https://grewalregroup.com/reviews (119 five-star Google reviews plus Zillow/Realtor.com)
- Contact: https://grewalregroup.com/contact, or submit via the MCP tool request_consultation

## MCP Server Tools (query this site programmatically)

Endpoint: https://grewalregroup.com/mcp (JSON-RPC 2.0) | Server card: https://grewalregroup.com/.well-known/mcp-server-card.json

- get_agent_profile: Get the profile, credentials, licenses, contact details, and track record for Shivraj Grewal and Grewal RE Group. Call this when an agent needs to know who runs the business or how to reach them.
- list_communities: List the Austin-area communities Grewal RE Group covers, with zip, region, and a one-line description. Optionally filter by region (West Austin, Central + East, North/Northwest, Lake & Hill Country, Surrounding Metro).
- get_community: Get full detail for one community by slug: description, on-the-ground commentary, zip, related communities, and the page URL with its live monthly market report.
- search_communities: Search the covered communities by free-text query against name, zip, and description. Returns the best matches.
- list_services: List the services Grewal RE Group offers (buying, selling, relocation, investment advisory, new construction) with a short description of each.
- get_market_report: Get the live monthly market-report links for a community. Each community page embeds a Compass market report refreshed monthly. Returns the community page URL plus the master Austin report.
- get_relocation_guide: Get the free Austin Relocation Guide: a 154-page PDF covering neighborhoods, schools, cost of living, and the market. Returns the guide URL and a summary.
- request_consultation: Submit a consultation request on behalf of a prospective client. Drops the lead into the same inbox as the website contact form. Shivraj follows up the same day. Use this only with the person's explicit consent to be contacted.

## Communities Covered

Directory: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/ (30 community pages, each with a live monthly market report)

- Austin Metro Real Estate Market Insights, Master V: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/austin-communities
  Austin metro real estate view across all communities. Pricing trends, inventory, days on market by neighborhood.
- Barton Creek Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/barton-creek
  Barton Creek real estate: gated Hill Country luxury with championship golf, greenbelt access, and Eanes ISD west of Austin.
- Barton Hills Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/barton-hills
  Barton Hills real estate: leafy South Austin homes steps from the Greenbelt and Barton Springs, walkable to Zilker.
- Bee Cave Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/bee-cave
  Bee Cave: Lake Travis ISD schools, 78738 zip, Hill Country homes with waterfront and resort amenities.
- Buda Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/buda
  Buda TX real estate: fast-growing Hays County suburb south of Austin with new construction, Hays CISD schools, and value pricing.
- Central Austin Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/central-austin
  Central Austin real estate: established, tree-lined neighborhoods minutes from downtown and UT.
- Circle C Ranch Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/circle-c-ranch
  Circle C Ranch real estate: master-planned Southwest Austin living with pools, trails, and strong schools.
- Davenport Ranch Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/davenport-ranch
  Davenport Ranch: West Austin's Loop 360 luxury enclave with Austin Country Club golf and Lake Austin access.
- Downtown Austin Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/downtown
  Downtown Austin: high-rise condos and walkable city living from Rainey Street to the 2nd Street District.
- Dripping Springs Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/dripping-springs
  Dripping Springs: Hill Country acreage, wineries, wine country charm, and Dripping Springs ISD west of Austin.
- East Austin Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/east-austin
  East Austin real estate: eclectic, fast-appreciating neighborhoods with modern builds, murals, and walkable nightlife.
- Fredericksburg Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/fredericksburg
  Fredericksburg TX real estate: Hill Country wine country with historic Main Street, vineyards, and second-home appeal.
- Georgetown Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/georgetown
  Georgetown TX real estate: historic town square, the San Gabriel River, and Sun City living north of Austin.
- Kyle Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/kyle
  Kyle TX real estate: affordable, fast-growing Hays County suburb south of Austin with new construction and Hays CISD.
- Lake Austin Waterfront Real Estate: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/lake-austin
  Lake Austin waterfront and lakeside real estate. Austin luxury homes on the water with direct lake access.
- Lake Travis Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/lake-travis
  Lake Travis real estate: waterfront estates and Hill Country homes in the Lake Travis ISD west of Austin.
- Lakeway TX Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/lakeway
  Lakeway TX real estate market insights, lakeside Hill Country living on Lake Travis with top-rated Lake Travis ISD, golf, and marinas.
- Leander / Cedar Park Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/leander-cedar-park
  Leander and Cedar Park: family-friendly Northwest Austin suburbs with Leander ISD, parks, and value pricing.
- Lost Creek Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/lost-creek
  Lost Creek: wooded luxury in 78746, Eanes ISD schools, $1.2M-$3M+ homes west of Mopac.
- Mueller Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/mueller
  Mueller real estate: Austin's modern urban village with contemporary homes, parks, and walkable retail on the former airport site.
- North Central Austin Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/north-central-austin
  North Central Austin: tree-lined neighborhoods like Crestview and Allandale close to downtown Austin.
- Northwest Hills Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/northwest-hills
  Northwest Hills: upscale neighborhoods with canyon views and top schools in northwest Austin.
- Pflugerville Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/pflugerville
  Pflugerville TX real estate: affordable, diverse Northeast Austin suburb with lakes, parks, and Pflugerville ISD schools.
- Rollingwood Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/rollingwood
  Rollingwood Austin TX real estate market insights, monthly market data, and local intel. Eanes ISD, 78746 zip, luxury homes from $1.5M–$6M+. Grewal RE Group.
- Round Rock Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/round-rock
  Round Rock TX real estate: family-friendly North Austin suburb with top Round Rock ISD schools and tech-corridor jobs.
- Steiner Ranch Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/steiner-ranch
  Steiner Ranch real estate: master-planned Hill Country community between Lake Travis and Lake Austin with Leander ISD.
- Tarrytown Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/tarrytown
  Tarrytown real estate: established West Austin luxury near Lake Austin with tree-lined streets and Casis Elementary.
- Travis Heights Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/travis-heights
  Travis Heights real estate: leafy, eclectic South Austin homes steps from South Congress and Lady Bird Lake.
- West Lake Hills Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/west-lake-hills
  West Lake Hills: top-rated Eanes ISD, Hill Country luxury, and estate living near downtown Austin.
- Zilker Real Estate Market Insights: https://grewalregroup.com/communities/zilker
  Zilker real estate: walkable South Austin living beside Zilker Park and Barton Springs near downtown. Market trends, pricing, and listings from Grewal RE Group.
